name: Bloody Mist
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed'. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

Allies inflict double the amount of [Laceration] Potency and Count with Skill effects against enemies.

The ally with the earliest Deployment order: Plus Coin Skills that inflict [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed': Coin Power +2 and deal +100% damage.
- Minus Coin Skills: Instead of gaining Coin Power, gain Base Power +(8 / # of Coins) (min 1; rounded down)
If the enemy attacked by or Clashed with the said ally dies, inflict the defeated enemy's remaining [Laceration] Potency randomly between all enemies. (for Focused Encounters, Parts)

Plus Coin Skills that inflict [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed': Coin Power +1, deal +30% damage
- Minus Coin Skills: Instead of gaining Coin Power, gain Base Power +(4 / # of Coins) (min 1; rounded down)
